lyrical_sections.lyrics: Mooo! Yeah. Say bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'.
Bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'. I'm not a cat, I don't say meow. I go 'mooo'.
Bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'. Got milk, bitch? Got beef? Got steak, ho? Got cheese?
Old MacDonald had a farm. I give him a titty, tryna keep him calm. He just wanna fondle, squeeze up on my teat. Looking at the pasture while he hitting from the—
Bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'. Bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow, bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'. Farmer's only, I'm so sorry. Farmers only, got milk hoe?
Mooo! Yeah. Mooo! Mooo! Bitch I'm a cow. I go 'mooo'.

structural_patterns_extracted.repetition_as_hypnosis: 'bitch I'm a cow' repeated until it's undeniable
structural_patterns_extracted.absurdist_escalation: cow → milk → beef → cheese → farm → titties → pasture → farmers only
structural_patterns_extracted.self_aware_mockery: 'I'm so sorry' after 'farmers only' — knows it's ridiculous, does it anyway

cadence_signatures.staccato_bounce: Short phrases, sharp endings, implied beat

cathedral_adaptation.absurdist_escalation: bytes → lattice → cathedral → fellowship → sovereign → mooo
cathedral_adaptation.self_aware_mockery: 'These are measured facts' — absurd claim, scientific delivery
